_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/budget.json and edit the values. The monitor's precedence is: env ANTHROPIC_PROGRAMMATIC_BUDGET_USD wins over monthly_usd; missing file falls through to 'unconfigured' (runway is not computed, no fabricated number). Tier strings: 'pro' | 'max5x' | 'max20x'. refill_iso is the next monthly reset (programmatic credits do NOT roll over).
